name: id_state
observations: Resolved from the state postal abbreviation.

name: id_county
observations: Blank for non-county reporting units (e.g. overseas/UOCAVA, statewide write-in); MEDSL city codes such as 2938000 (Kansas City) are 7 digits.

name: party_detailed
description: Full party label of the candidate's ballot line, uppercase.
observations: Mapped from the source single-party column.

name: party_simplified
description: Party collapsed to DEMOCRAT, REPUBLICAN, LIBERTARIAN or OTHER.

name: mode
description: Mode of voting; TOTAL when returns are not broken down by mode.

name: votes
description: Votes received by the candidate in this county.

name: total_votes
description: Total votes cast in this county contest.
